tweets.full_text:
My thoughts on Jupiter Vote:

1 - PumpFun also promised a huge airdrop just to get people to participate in their ICO and keep using their platform

People burn fees and lose liquidity daily, and not a cent has been given back to the community

2 - There may not be a right decision (and it's okay), sometimes projects just get stuck in the middle of nowhere, and both options look bad

That's why a lot of people ask for "Option 3"

3 - I think the team is in a position where it's hard to make the community happy with the result because they will be unsatisfied anyway

4 - A lot of people think "Option 2" will pump the price, but it's not completely true

To pump the price, you need a bull market plus a use case for the token

With Option 2, you just remove selling pressure the token will stop going lower, but it will not pump because there isn't enough buying pressure

5 - Who is selling?

A lot of people say that the team is selling, but where is the on-chain proof?

To really claim that the team is selling, we need full on-chain proof: when and how much, but I don't think there is even one of them

I think $JUP is still the best choice among all Solana DeFi, and once market kick off, we can see come back, because anyway all tokens down

With Option 2, you just remove selling pressure the token will stop going lower, but it will not pump because there isn't enough buying pressure

5 - Who is selling?

A lot of people say that the team is selling, but where is the on-chain proof?

To really claim that the team is selling, we need full on-chain proof: when and how much, but I don't think there is even one of them

I think $JUP is still the best choice among all Solana DeFi, and once market kick off, we can see come back, because anyway all tokens down

tweets.full_text:
New Chapter for WIDI begins now.

Rebranding ahead & sunsetting $WIDI

TL;DR

$WIDI will no longer be the core token across our products. 

Our app, existing & upcoming products, team, roadmap, and long-term vision remain fully active.

To stay aligned with what’s next, our community can burn their $WIDI tokens to be considered for future allocations.

Burn deadline: February 20, 2026
Burn link: https://t.co/Hxow6hdxao

WHY?

Over time, we reached a clear and honest conclusion:

We couldn’t define token utility in a way that genuinely reflected the real value of our products.
As a result, the token’s market dynamics and our product progress started to diverge and we don’t believe that’s healthy for builders or for the community.

WIDI has never been about short-term narratives or token-first decisions.
It’s always been about shipping, iterating fast, and building long-term on Solana.

We’re entering a bigger phase fully focused on DEFAI starting with our upcoming prediction markets & AI integrations.

To do that right, we’re moving toward a cleaner, more flexible capital structure giving us full optionality to stay bootstrapped, raise strategically, or explore acquisitions after the rebrand.

Burning your tokens keeps you eligible for future allocations tied to what comes next.

This update is about alignment.

WHAT WE'VE DONE SO FAR?

Before & since the launch of $WIDI, we’ve:
- Received over-limit grants from Solana Foundation
- Led Blinks ecosystem with our first of its kind tools
- Built an App on Seeker and shipped real products with thousands of active users, generating over $2M in in-app volume so far. (actively being used)
- Airdropped to multiple Solana communities, starting with Seeker holders
- Reached sustainable revenue levels that cover our operational costs

WHAT'S CHANGING?

- All existing products, App will continue to be developed, nothing changes
- $WIDI will no longer have product-level utility and won’t be the core token of our ecosystem
- We’re moving forward with a rebrand (details soon)

New products are coming, starting with prediction markets (launching this week)

Our focus remains 100% on WIDI.

This is not a f. step back.
This is us doubling down. 🤝

LOYALTY MATTERS

We deeply care about our loyal holders and believers.
We couldn’t have come this far without them.

This applies to anything we launch going forward.
To remain part of the WIDI ecosystem and be considered for future opportunities, holders may choose to burn their $WIDI tokens.

Burned tokens will be tracked via an on-chain snapshot of participating wallets.

This snapshot may be used for potential future allocations, including:
- Equity considerations
- Strategic upside from fundraising or acquisition scenarios
- Potential token distribution

Important notes:

- Allocation size (X%) will depend entirely on future capital structure
- More burned = higher proportional consideration
- If you’re not a holder yet, purchasing and burning tokens before the deadline will also make you eligible.
- Long-time holders who participate in the burn will receive additional benefits, as a recognition of their early support.
- Even if you choose not to participate in the burn, $WIDI will remain freely tradable on Solana through permanently locked liquidity pools.

The foundation will wind down its treasury (roughly 40%, including vested supply) and will be excluded from community burns, ensuring this allocation remains fully non-dilutive.

Additionally, our Telegram General channel will remain active.
All official updates and announcements will be shared on our X & Telegram both as always.

My DMs, my team’s DMs, and our support channel’s DMs are always open for any questions, collaborations, suggestions, or support related to our app and products.

Token Burn deadline: February 20, 2026

Also, affiliate badges on X will be reviewed and updated.
- Badges will remain for active leaders using the app
- Core team members will continue to hold their badges
- Inactive or no-longer-aligned affiliate badges will be removed

WHAT'S NEXT?

After the rebrand, WIDI may:
- Raise capital from angels or VCs
- Explore strategic acquisition opportunities
or continue fully bootstrapped

The exact path will depend on what best serves the long-term vision.

Expect more announcements soon👀

Our promise going forward

We’ll continue to be:
- One of the fastest-moving teams in DeFi × AI
- Deeply rooted in Solana
- Focused on building innovative products
- We’ll keep adapting, iterating, improving existing apps, and shipping new ones.

This update is only about the token.
Our commitment to building and to the ecosystem is stronger than ever.

We’re not done.
We’re just more focused.

Team WIDI 🤝

📊Solana Data Insights – @Solana Commands 49% of x402 Market Share as Micropayment Competition Intensifies

✍️ @ario_57_

Key takeaways from this report:

• Solana currently holds 49.7% of x402 transaction share, down from a peak above 88% earlier this month as competition from @0xPolygon accelerates.

• Total x402 transactions across all chains have surpassed 120M, with Solana contributing more than 45M transactions.

• Solana overtook @base in weekly activity as early as December 2025, recording 5.8M weekly transactions versus Base’s 5.3M.

• Cumulative x402 payment volume has exceeded $41M, with Solana accounting for more than $16.4M in transferred value.

• Weekly Solana x402 transactions have declined sharply, falling over 90% from a peak of 6.8M in December 2025 to fewer than 510,000 in the week of February 9.

• Facilitator activity remains highly concentrated, with Dexter processing 68.7% of Solana transactions and over 75% of total volume, followed by @PayAINetwork at 30.5%.

• More than 25,000 seller wallets and 18,000 buyer wallets have participated in x402 micropayments since October 2025.

• Recent wallet activity has shifted toward buyers, with about 3,700 buyers versus roughly 1,200 sellers active during the week of February 9.

• Data suggests much of the early activity was non-organic, with over 78% of transactions and more than 98% of volume classified as non-organic at peak usage.

• Despite recent declines, Solana remains one of the primary infrastructure layers powering internet native micropayment protocols like x402.

Subscribe for the full breakdown 👇
https://t.co/Q5TipqL2tC

• Facilitator activity remains highly concentrated, with Dexter processing 68.7% of Solana transactions and over 75% of total volume, followed by @PayAINetwork at 30.5%.

• More than 25,000 seller wallets and 18,000 buyer wallets have participated in x402 micropayments since October 2025.

• Recent wallet activity has shifted toward buyers, with about 3,700 buyers versus roughly 1,200 sellers active during the week of February 9.

• Data suggests much of the early activity was non-organic, with over 78% of transactions and more than 98% of volume classified as non-organic at peak usage.

• Despite recent declines, Solana remains one of the primary infrastructure layers powering internet native micropayment protocols like x402.

result.text:
New DAO Proposal: Bring Net Emissions To Zero (Jupiter Goes Green)

Today, we shared one of the most important @jup_dao proposals so far.

The objective: take $JUP net emissions to effectively zero.

To be clear, we are not unilaterally deciding on this plan.

This is exactly the kind of high-leverage decision that affects all token holders, and as such ought to go to a DAO vote.

If the vote doesn’t pass, we will continue with Jupuary. The airdrop checker will be released ~Feb 28th and the actual airdrop will take place on ~March 7th.

But if this vote passes, it will address a key point of concern from token holders, build a powerful narrative, and demonstrate a ridiculously high level of conviction in the long-term importance of $JUP.

The proposal itself is live right now on the Jupiter Research Forums (discuss dot jup dot ag). We welcome comments over the coming 4 days.

The vote will begin on Tuesday and go through Saturday (5 total days).

Excited to see what folks think - I’m sure there will be many opinions, and me and the rest of the team will try to respond as much as possible.

setelah event @MeteoraIDN tanggal 29 januari kemaren gua sempet onboarding temen untuk terjun di crypto, khususnya di @MeteoraAG 

gua modalin dia 0.2 sol pake magic link dari @jup_mobile , gua masukin grup telegram dan ajarin hal-hal dasar tentang :

- token security
- swap di jup
- wallet security
- analisa token yang bener di gmgn
- strategi bid-ask di dlmm (bid-ask doang default range)
- track wallet

setelah 2 minggu dia berhasil compounding dari 0.2 sol jadi 1.8 sol. main dlmm di meteora ga harus mulai dari modal gede, dari 0.2 sol pun bisa kalo kalian sabar dan tau cara compounding yang bener.

next gua bakal onboarding temen-temen gua lagi untuk terjun di meteora dengan modal kecil dulu.

enaknya sekarang bisa langsung praktek di playground lp army, jadi kalo menurut gua mereka udah siap terjun di medan tempur, baru deh gua modalin.

sebenarnya gua juga pernah eksperimen serupa di bulan desember kemarin, ada satu temen juga yang berhasil start dari 0.257 sol jadi 1 sol juga.

tapi karena terlalu agresif dan market lagi bobrok waktu itu, profitnya abis di 3 ticker.

tertarik untuk belajar dlmm? gabung discord kita di @MeteoraIDN

data.translation:
After the @MeteoraIDN event on January 29th, I ended up onboarding a friend to dive into crypto, specifically into @MeteoraAG.

I funded him with 0.2 SOL using a magic link from @jup_mobile, added him to the Telegram group, and taught him the basic stuff about:

- token security
- swapping on Jup
- wallet security
- proper token analysis on gmgn
- bid-ask strategy on DLMM (just bid-ask with default range)
- wallet tracking

After 2 weeks, he successfully compounded from 0.2 SOL to 1.8 SOL. You don’t need a big starting capital to play DLMM on Meteora—even 0.2 SOL is enough if you’re patient and know how to compound properly.

Next, I’m planning to onboard more of my friends to get into Meteora, starting with small capital first.

The nice thing now is you can practice directly in the LP Army playground first. So in my opinion, once I feel they’re ready for the real battlefield, that’s when I’ll fund them.

Actually, I did a similar experiment back in December last year too—there was one friend who also managed to grow from 0.257 SOL to 1 SOL.

But because he was too aggressive and the market was trash at that time, the profit got wiped out on just 3 tickers.

Interested in learning DLMM? Join our Discord at @MeteoraIDN

tweets.full_text:
in this livestream with @meteora_my , i'm explaining how do i screening my token in this market for DLMM on @MeteoraAG 

it's a simple method but yet, very effective.

- use gmgn for the screener
- filter minimum 200k mcap
- minimum total fees paid 20 sol
- check the X community, what's the token really about, what's the narration behind the token. is it long lasting or just a hit tweet that tokenized
- check the holder, is there any suspicious holder or high frequency transfers

also a new things to check is the recently viewed on gmgn page. i also test this as an indicator how's that affecting.

more people see that token, meaning more people monitoring = more organic buy on that token.

imo, 100+ views on a tokens considered as good.
